description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a light blue exterior, featuring a flat roof and a mix of large and small rectangular windows distributed across its facades. The front entrance is marked by a central wooden door, flanked by a driveway with a parked car and a garage on one side. The property is landscaped with several coniferous trees and a large deciduous tree, as well as a patch of grass and a small pond in the backyard. A sunroom or enclosed porch with a wooden frame and large windows extends from one side of the house. The layout includes multiple rooms visible through the open roof, with interior walls painted in light colors and some rooms furnished. The overall design is modern and functional, with an emphasis on open space and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story blue bungalow with a flat roof, central entrance, garage, sunroom, and landscaped yard featuring trees and a pond.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with a car, central tree, and several coniferous trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sunroom extension, backyard trees, and a visible pond area.
description_view_2: Backyard view with a clear view of the pond, sunroom, and grouped trees, as well as the rear facade's window arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garage, car, large tree, and the rear portion of the bungalow with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
